headline: Fitch Upgrades Coterra and Maintains Rating Watch Positive Following Devon Merger Completion
summary: Fitch Ratings has upgraded Coterra Energy, Inc.'s Long-Term Issuer Default Rating and senior unsecured notes to 'BBB+' from 'BBB'.The Rating Watch Positive is maintained.The upgrade reflects the...
